signatureMove.name: Gore
signatureMove.extraText: This attack deals {Null} damage against models which are further than 1" away.

abilities.name: Hunting Spear
abilities.description: If this character deals Piercing or Slicing Melee Dmg, increase the Dmg dealt by +1. If this character deals Melee Dmg against an Animal, increase the Dmg by +1.

abilities.name: Sun Shield
abilities.description: If this character suffers Impact or Magical Dmg, reduce the Dmg suffered by -1.

abilities.name: Utter Swine
abilities.description: You may have another friendly model within 6" suffer 2 Wds. If they do then target enemy loses one Arcane Ability of your choice until end of turn.

abilities.name: Chaaarge!!
abilities.description: Move this model 4" directly towards target enemy model. If this character's next action this turn is a Melee Attack against the same target it deals +2 Dmg.
